Vernal City Employment Application

This form has been modified since it was saved. Please review all fields before submitting.

* indicates a required field

Steps

  1. 1. Step One (current) This section is complete This section is incomplete
  2. 2. Personal Information This section is complete This section is incomplete
  3. 3. Job-Related Questions This section is complete This section is incomplete
  4. 4. Education and Training This section is complete This section is incomplete
  5. 5. Professional Experience This section is complete This section is incomplete
  6. 6. References This section is complete This section is incomplete
  7. 7. Agreement This section is complete This section is incomplete

  • Step One

    4. IMPORTANT

      Read the following instructions carefully before filling out your application. All requested information must be furnished. The information you give will be used to determine your qualifications for employment. It is important that you answer all questions on your application fully and accurately; failure to do so may delay its consideration and could mean loss of employment opportunities. If an item does not apply to you, or if there is no information given, please write the letters "N/A" for Not Applicable. Please type or print all information. You must sign and date this application.

    6. Continue

    Personal Information

    12. Continue |Go Back

    Job-Related Questions

    4. Type of Employment:
    5. Are you currently employed?
    6. Do you have a valid driver's license?
    11. Are you a citizen of the US?
    14. Have you ever worked for Vernal City?
    17. Do you have a valid CDL?
    21. Have you been convicted of a felony?
    24. Have you served in in the military?
    27. Are you related to a Vernal City Employee?
    30. Continue |Go Back

    Education and Training

    2. Have you graduated high school (or equivalent)?
    8. Have you obtained any education post high school (college, apprenticeship, etc.)? If yes, please provide details below.
    13. Did you complete/graduate?
    18. Did you complete/graduate?
    24. Continue |Go Back

    Professional Experience

    2. Beginning with present or most recent experience, account for at least your past 10 years of employment. If you wish to elaborate on your experience, a cover letter or resume may be attached, but this section MUST be filled out. 

    11. May We Contact This Employer?

    References

    17. Continue |Go Back

    Agreement

    2. Agreement

      I certify that the answers given herein are true and accurate to the best of my knowledge. 

      I authorize you to make such investigations and inquiries of my personal, employment, or criminal history as may be necessary in arriving at an employment decision. I hereby release employers and law enforcement agencies or persons from all liability in responding to inquiries in connection with my application. 

      In the event of employment, I understand that false or misleading information given in my application or interview(s) may result in discharge. I understand also that I am required to abide by all rules and regulations of Vernal City. 

    4. Full Name

      6. Leave This Blank:

    7. This field is not part of the form submission.
